title: Bounded One-Mutation-Worker Pilot Source/Test Execution
objective: Open and execute exactly one bounded one-mutation-worker source/test pilot under Packet 059 guardrails, leaving publication and host reconciliation to later separate packets.
active_role: Olares One Mutation Worker Pilot Operator
dependency_note: Packet 062 published the Packet 061 one-mutation-worker pilot decision in commit `356dcfc32783765af27f2d70fbdd91b65d3129bb` and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity, but did not open execution.

owned_surfaces: publication and host reconciliation decisions after this packet

mutation_slice.name: relay_search_blank_input_guard_source_test_slice
mutation_slice.shared_risk_note: `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` is sole-owned by the one mutation worker for Packet 063. No second worker or overlapping slice may touch it during this packet.

constrained_outputs: One host-side source/test artifact limited to the selected two-file relay search blank-input guard slice
A Packet 063 handoff recording exact file scope, validation, blockers if any, unpublished artifact status, and the single next packet
Routing and roadmap updates only to record Packet 063 closeout and name the next separate packet
validation_steps: Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Apply only the two-file relay search blank-input guard source/test slice.
Run `git diff --check` on the exact owned source/test slice.
Confirm no package or lockfile drift.
Run existing no-install validation available on the host for the owned slice.
Record any executable validation blocker exactly and stop at unpublished trial-artifact state.

Do not publish, push, reconcile `/home/olares/code/apex`, author a second worker lane, mutate runtime/services, mutate packages/lockfiles, install, rewrite remotes, roll back, force/reset/clean, or mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
preserved_boundaries: Packet 062 publication is authority publication only, not publication of an execution artifact.
The pilot is bounded to one mutation worker under Packet 059 guardrails.
No second worker lane is opened.
Remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean remain closed.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no migration, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, publication, host reconciliation, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 063 opened exactly one mutation worker and executed exactly one host-side source/test slice on `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`: `apps/operations-web/app/relay-resource-explorer.tsx` and `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`. The slice adds a blank relay-search guard that trims the query before backend fetch and proves no relay section request fires for whitespace-only input. The shared smoke file was sole-owned by the one mutation worker for this packet. Host diff scope was exactly two files, package and lockfile paths stayed clean, `git diff --check` passed, and diff SHA-256 was `36aa41ad9a0997c7c8fd909080113ca8169b26758fe17537475d5cc461ca2844`. Executable validation did not fully run because the host has no `pnpm`, no `node_modules`, no local/global `tsc`, and no local/global Playwright executable; `npx --no-install` canceled rather than downloading. The artifact remains uncommitted and unpublished on `/home/olares/code/apex` with status count 2. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` was observed only and remained at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30.
next_action: Open only Packet 064 as a post-063 validation path decision packet. Packet 063 does not authorize publication, host reconciliation, migration, package/toolchain repair, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, old-clone mutation, a second mutation worker, or any wider execution lane.
